name: Lyra
author: Project Lyra
description: The Lyra platform: the mod manager UI, zuxhook, nativeapp daemon, and its component mods (mods-tab, wifi-power, clock-date) all wrapped in a pretty bow.
changelog: Adds a SET DATE option in Settings, Clock so you can correct the date on a device whose clock has reset, which fixes HTTPS to the mod repo.
